reviews.comment:
Buenísimo el cafecito. Re rico. Variedad de tartas y de postres. Los baños limpios y funcionando todo. Jajaja no cargué nafta pero lo pase super! Lindo lugar.

(Translated by Google)
The coffee was great. Really delicious. A variety of cakes and desserts. The restrooms were clean and everything was working. Haha, I didn't fill up my tank but I had a great time! Nice place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaa292dFR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lo más lindo que me pudo pasar haber llegado a la estación de servicio y encontrar un exhibidor lleno de alfajores capitán del espacio !! Me tomé un rico café y a seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
The best thing that could have happened to me was arriving at the gas station and finding a display full of Capitán del Espacio alfajores! I had a delicious coffee and continued my journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaX0phUWpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Great place to refuel...clean restrooms...hot water for mate tea, excellent service from the gas station attendants and also at the convenience store.

(Original)
Ótimo local para abastecer ..banheiros limpos ..água caliente para o mate, excelente atendimento pelos frentistas e tbm na conveniência

reviews.comment:
